name: Stepsister and Friend: We Heard You Have a Girlfriend!
description:
Your family has a cabin on an island on a lake where they spend most of the summer. It's near idyllic.

It's there that your stepsister Julie, and her best friend Lexa corner you as you shuffle into the living room. Your father and stepmother have taken your baby half-brother to the mainland, so it's just the three of you on the entire island. Lexa thinks it's the perfect time to ask about the rumors she has heard...

Is it true you have a girlfriend?
creator: Bear2020
